name: community-registry-starter
title: Community Registry Starter
description: A minimal community plugin that exercises the default registry source and install provenance path.

query.en: Create a compact status card that explains how a community Open Design plugin flows from Available to Installed.
query.zh-CN: 创建一个紧凑状态卡片，说明社区 Open Design 插件如何从 Available 安装到 Installed。
